title: Online-research egress axis (default off) + gated web retrieval
description: Add a new opt-in egress axis for online/web research that mirrors the medical EgressGuard pattern (default false, fail-closed), introduce a ResearchEgressGuard, and wire the runner's web-retrieval step behind it so that with the axis off a run is fully offline and with the axis on the run retrieves sources the note cites.

successCriteria.description: A ResearchSection in src/config/schema.ts adds egress.onlineResearch defaulting to false, and a ResearchEgressGuard.fromConfig reads it; isAllowed('online-research') returns false when absent from config.
ResearchEgressGuard.assertAllowed('online-research') throws an Error when the axis is off and returns void when egress.onlineResearch is true, matching the throw semantics of src/medical/egress.ts.

With the axis off (default config), a run records zero invocations of the injected fetch/retrieval client; with the axis on, the retrieval client is invoked and the resulting note frontmatter or body lists the retrieved source URLs.
The project compiles with the new ResearchSection wired into BoberConfigSchema and the runner gated by ResearchEgressGuard.

nonGoals: Do not enable the axis by default — egress.onlineResearch must default to false (fail-closed).
Do not reuse or widen the medical egress axes; create a separate research-owned axis so the two domains stay independent.
Do not perform real network calls in tests — the retrieval client is injected and spied.
Do not implement cadence/tick (Sprint 4) or digest (Sprint 5).
stopConditions: npm run build passes and tests assert: default isAllowed false, assertAllowed throws when off, zero retrieval calls when off, retrieval invoked and sources cited when on.
The ResearchEgressGuard gates the runner's retrieval branch and the no-egress default path is byte-identical to Sprint 2's offline run.
definitionOfDone: Online/web research is a separate code-enforced egress axis defaulting to false. ResearchEgressGuard mirrors src/medical/egress.ts: isAllowed returns false by default and assertAllowed throws when off. The runner only performs retrieval when the axis is opted in; a default-config run issues zero outbound requests, and an opted-in run cites the retrieved sources in the note. Build is green and prior tests still pass.
assumptions: The new axis mirrors src/medical/egress.ts:1-60 EgressGuard exactly (constructor of booleans, fromConfig, isAllowed, assertAllowed) but for a research-owned 'online-research' axis (resolved per egress pattern). Evidence: src/medical/egress.ts:1-60, src/config/schema.ts:374-401.

ResearchSectionSchema is added to BoberConfigSchema as an optional section, additive and default-off, so existing configs validate unchanged. Evidence: MedicalSectionSchema optional-section pattern in src/config/schema.ts:374-447.
The retrieval step may reuse the shape of src/medical/retrieval/literature.ts but lives in src/research/ and takes an injected client so it is offline-testable.
outOfScope: Choosing a specific search/literature provider beyond an injectable client interface.
Medical literature retrieval internals (src/medical/retrieval/ stays untouched).
generatorNotes: Add ResearchSectionSchema to src/config/schema.ts with `egress: z.object({ onlineResearch: z.boolean().default(false) }).optional()`, and register it as `research: ResearchSectionSchema.optional()` on BoberConfigSchema next to the medical section (~L447). Create src/research/egress.ts modeled line-for-line on src/medical/egress.ts:1-60: EgressAxis type = 'online-research', class ResearchEgressGuard with constructor(boolean), static fromConfig(config) reading config.research?.egress?.onlineResearch ?? false, isAllowed, and assertAllowed that throws `Egress axis 'online-research' not enabled`. Create src/research/online-retrieval.ts with a retrieve(query, client) function. In src/research/runner.ts, guard the retrieval branch: call guard.assertAllowed('online-research') (or check isAllowed) before invoking the retrieval client; when off, skip retrieval entirely so no client is constructed. Thread retrieved source URLs into the note frontmatter/body.
evaluatorNotes: Assert ResearchEgressGuard.fromConfig({}) .isAllowed('online-research') === false (sc-3-1). Assert assertAllowed throws when off and is silent when on (sc-3-2). Run the runner with a spy retrieval client: default config -> spy called 0 times; config.research.egress.onlineResearch=true -> spy called and note lists the returned source URLs (sc-3-3). Confirm BoberConfigSchema still parses a config with no `research` section (additive). Confirm npm run build passes.
